item.title: How To Make The Perfect Cinnamon Toast
item.description: ingredients: 1/2 cup unsalted butter, at room temp, 1/3 cup granulated sugar, 1 tsp ground cinnamon, 1 tsp pure vanilla extract, flaky sea salt. Bake at 350 for 10 min and then turn on broiler and leave it under there for 2 min. slice in half and sprinkle with sea salt!

media:content.media:title: How To Make The Perfect Cinnamon Toast
media:content.media:description: ingredients: 1/2 cup unsalted butter, at room temp, 1/3 cup granulated sugar, 1 tsp ground cinnamon, 1 tsp pure vanilla extract, flaky sea salt. Bake at 350 for 10 min and then turn on broiler and leave it under there for 2 min. slice in half and sprinkle with sea salt!

item.title: How to Make Crispy and Crunchy Churros
item.description: These Churros are crispy on the outside and soft and fluffy on the inside. They’re fried and then immediately rolled in cinnamon and sugar. Churros are made from a super easy choux pastry that when piped into hot oil, turns into something magical and delicious.

media:content.media:title: How to Make Crispy and Crunchy Churros
media:content.media:description: These Churros are crispy on the outside and soft and fluffy on the inside. They’re fried and then immediately rolled in cinnamon and sugar. Churros are made from a super easy choux pastry that when piped into hot oil, turns into something magical and delicious.

item.title: Fluffy Lemon Crinkle Cookies
item.description: These lemon crinkle cookies are fluffy, cake-y, and come together in no time. They’re perfect for when you need a quick homemade treat that still feels special. The bright lemon flavor is so refreshing, and they look absolutely beautiful with that crackled powdered sugar coating.

media:content.media:title: Fluffy Lemon Crinkle Cookies
media:content.media:description: These lemon crinkle cookies are fluffy, cake-y, and come together in no time. They’re perfect for when you need a quick homemade treat that still feels special. The bright lemon flavor is so refreshing, and they look absolutely beautiful with that crackled powdered sugar coating.

item.title: Juicy Lemon Kofta Recipe
item.description: This Lamb Kofta is full of warm spices, sautéed onions and garlic, Italian parsley and baked in the oven. These lamb kofta can be made in under 30 minutes. Eat these Middle Eastern meatballs with hummus, pita, rice and your favorite salad.

media:content.media:title: Juicy Lemon Kofta Recipe
media:content.media:description: This Lamb Kofta is full of warm spices, sautéed onions and garlic, Italian parsley and baked in the oven. These lamb kofta can be made in under 30 minutes. Eat these Middle Eastern meatballs with hummus, pita, rice and your favorite salad.

item.title: Grinder Pasta Salad Recipe
item.description: Full recipe: 1 pound cavatappi pasta 1 1/2 cups mayonnaise 1/2 cup red wine vinegar 1/2 teaspoon dried oregano Pinch of kosher salt 1 jar of pepperoncinis, sliced 1 round of salami 1 package balls of very small mozzarella 1 red onion, thinly sliced (soaked in water) 1 pint cherry tomatoes, halved 1/4 head iceberg lettuce, thinly sliced 1 log of salami, diced

media:content.media:title: Grinder Pasta Salad Recipe
media:content.media:description: Full recipe: 1 pound cavatappi pasta 1 1/2 cups mayonnaise 1/2 cup red wine vinegar 1/2 teaspoon dried oregano Pinch of kosher salt 1 jar of pepperoncinis, sliced 1 round of salami 1 package balls of very small mozzarella 1 red onion, thinly sliced (soaked in water) 1 pint cherry tomatoes, halved 1/4 head iceberg lettuce, thinly sliced 1 log of salami, diced

item.title: Crispy Chicken Parm Sandwich
item.description:
recipe below: 1 cup panko bread crumbs ¼ cup grated Parmesan-Reggiano, plus more for topping 1 teaspoon dried oregano 1 teaspoon garlic powder#¼ teaspoon kosher salt 2 boneless skinless chicken breasts, pounded thinly 1 cup all-purpose flour 2 large eggs, beaten Frying oil (I used avocado oil)
Sandwich Assembly: Italian loaf, halved Warmed marinara sauce,(I used Rao’s) 4 slices provolone cheese Fresh basil leaves Mix the panko bread crumbs with the parmesan, dried oregano, garlic and ½ teaspoon salt. Heat oil in a shallow pan over medium-high heat. Dip the chicken in the flour first, shaking off any excess. Next transfer it to the beaten egg and then the panko. Press the panko onto the chicken, ensuring it sticks and is evenly coated. Place in the hot oil and cook until crispy and golden brown, about 1-2 minutes per side. Take the temp of the chicken, ensuring it has reached 165F and is fully cooked. Place chicken on a small baking sheet and add warm marinara on top, along with a few slices of provolone cheese. Transfer to a warm oven until melty. Add a few tbls of warm marinara to a warm italian loaf, top woth the chicken, more parmesean and freshly cut basil.

media:content.media:title: Crispy Chicken Parm Sandwich
media:content.media:description:
recipe below: 1 cup panko bread crumbs ¼ cup grated Parmesan-Reggiano, plus more for topping 1 teaspoon dried oregano 1 teaspoon garlic powder#¼ teaspoon kosher salt 2 boneless skinless chicken breasts, pounded thinly 1 cup all-purpose flour 2 large eggs, beaten Frying oil (I used avocado oil)
Sandwich Assembly: Italian loaf, halved Warmed marinara sauce,(I used Rao’s) 4 slices provolone cheese Fresh basil leaves Mix the panko bread crumbs with the parmesan, dried oregano, garlic and ½ teaspoon salt. Heat oil in a shallow pan over medium-high heat. Dip the chicken in the flour first, shaking off any excess. Next transfer it to the beaten egg and then the panko. Press the panko onto the chicken, ensuring it sticks and is evenly coated. Place in the hot oil and cook until crispy and golden brown, about 1-2 minutes per side. Take the temp of the chicken, ensuring it has reached 165F and is fully cooked. Place chicken on a small baking sheet and add warm marinara on top, along with a few slices of provolone cheese. Transfer to a warm oven until melty. Add a few tbls of warm marinara to a warm italian loaf, top woth the chicken, more parmesean and freshly cut basil.

item.title: Italian Chopped Pasta Salad Recipe
item.description: This the perfect summer pasta salad for a picnic or party. This Italian Pasta Salad comes together in less than 20 minutes and it’s packed with everything from sweet cherry tomatoes, Persian cucumbers, fresh mozzarella and briny olives.

media:content.media:title: Italian Chopped Pasta Salad Recipe
media:content.media:description: This the perfect summer pasta salad for a picnic or party. This Italian Pasta Salad comes together in less than 20 minutes and it’s packed with everything from sweet cherry tomatoes, Persian cucumbers, fresh mozzarella and briny olives.

item.title: Limoncello Grapefruit Spritz Recipe
item.description: full recipe: 1 grapefruit, zested 1 tbls kosher salt 4 ounces limoncello 4 ounces grapefruit juice 2 ounces elderflower liqueur Rub the zest of the grapefruit with the kosher salt. Rim two glasses with a slice of grapefruit and dip in the salt. Add ice cubes to the glasses and set aside. To make the cocktail, to a shaker, add ice, the limoncello, grapefruit juice and elderflower liqueur. Shake vigorously. Divide amongst the two glasses. Top with a splash of sparkling water.

media:content.media:title: Limoncello Grapefruit Spritz Recipe
media:content.media:description: full recipe: 1 grapefruit, zested 1 tbls kosher salt 4 ounces limoncello 4 ounces grapefruit juice 2 ounces elderflower liqueur Rub the zest of the grapefruit with the kosher salt. Rim two glasses with a slice of grapefruit and dip in the salt. Add ice cubes to the glasses and set aside. To make the cocktail, to a shaker, add ice, the limoncello, grapefruit juice and elderflower liqueur. Shake vigorously. Divide amongst the two glasses. Top with a splash of sparkling water.

item.title: Delicious and Refreshing: Strawberry Lemonade Sangria
item.description: This strawberry lemonade sangria is delicious, refreshing and full of fresh fruit like strawberries and lemon slices. Summer is coming up so it’s perfect for a summer weekend.

media:content.media:title: Delicious and Refreshing: Strawberry Lemonade Sangria
media:content.media:description: This strawberry lemonade sangria is delicious, refreshing and full of fresh fruit like strawberries and lemon slices. Summer is coming up so it’s perfect for a summer weekend.

item.title: Buffalo Chicken Wrap Recipe
item.description:
Here's the full recipe: 1 pound chicken tenders 1/2 cup all-purpose flour 2 large eggs, beaten 1 cup panko bread crumbs 1/2 cup finely grated parmesan Frying oil Buffalo sauce (I used Frank’s Hot) 4 slices provolone, halved Iceberg lettuce, shredded
Place the chicken tenders on a cutting board. Create a assembly line with three bowls. In the first, add the flour; in the second, the beaten eggs; in the third, combine the panko bread crumbs, parmesan and 1/2 teaspoon kosher salt. Heat up the oil until hot. Dip the chicken tenders in the flour, then the egg and lastly the bread crumbs. Repeat. Pan fry the chicken tenders in the oil until crispy on both sides, about 2-3 minutes. Cut up the chicken into slices and toss with buffalo sauce.
Assemble the wraps by placing a large (burrito-sized) tortilla on a cutting board. Add the provolone slices to the center. Top with chicken, add iceberg lettuce and wrap like a burrito. Slice in half.

media:content.media:title: Buffalo Chicken Wrap Recipe
media:content.media:description:
Here's the full recipe: 1 pound chicken tenders 1/2 cup all-purpose flour 2 large eggs, beaten 1 cup panko bread crumbs 1/2 cup finely grated parmesan Frying oil Buffalo sauce (I used Frank’s Hot) 4 slices provolone, halved Iceberg lettuce, shredded
Place the chicken tenders on a cutting board. Create a assembly line with three bowls. In the first, add the flour; in the second, the beaten eggs; in the third, combine the panko bread crumbs, parmesan and 1/2 teaspoon kosher salt. Heat up the oil until hot. Dip the chicken tenders in the flour, then the egg and lastly the bread crumbs. Repeat. Pan fry the chicken tenders in the oil until crispy on both sides, about 2-3 minutes. Cut up the chicken into slices and toss with buffalo sauce.
Assemble the wraps by placing a large (burrito-sized) tortilla on a cutting board. Add the provolone slices to the center. Top with chicken, add iceberg lettuce and wrap like a burrito. Slice in half.

item.title: Detroit-Style Pizza Recipe
item.description: This Detroit Style Pizza recipe has a thick, delicious yeasted crust. It’s topped with the perfect amount of sauce, melty cheesy and a blanket of pepperoni cups. And while most recipes require a 24-hour ferment, this recipe takes a fraction of the time!

media:content.media:title: Detroit-Style Pizza Recipe
media:content.media:description: This Detroit Style Pizza recipe has a thick, delicious yeasted crust. It’s topped with the perfect amount of sauce, melty cheesy and a blanket of pepperoni cups. And while most recipes require a 24-hour ferment, this recipe takes a fraction of the time!

item.title: Strawberry Cream Cake
item.description: This Strawberry Cream Cake plays consists of a fluffy white cake, layered with a whipped buttercream and fresh strawberries. This cake recipe is delicious, refreshing and ode to the Wimbledon classic.

media:content.media:title: Strawberry Cream Cake
media:content.media:description: This Strawberry Cream Cake plays consists of a fluffy white cake, layered with a whipped buttercream and fresh strawberries. This cake recipe is delicious, refreshing and ode to the Wimbledon classic.
